name: ppt-generator
description: Generate professional presentation slides from a text outline. Supports Marp/Slidev format, auto layout, theme selection, and export to PDF/PPTX.

name: xiaohongshu-autopilot
description: Automate Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) content creation and publishing. Generate trending posts, auto-reply comments, track analytics, and manage multiple accounts.

name: meeting-summarizer
description: Transcribe meeting recordings, extract key points and action items, generate structured meeting notes, and send summaries to Feishu/DingTalk/WeCom.

name: csv-analyst
description: Natural language data analysis for CSV files and databases. Ask questions in plain language, get charts and insights. Supports pandas, matplotlib, and SQL.

name: customer-service-agent
description: Multi-channel AI customer service agent. Connects to WeChat, Telegram, and web chat. Knowledge-base driven, auto-escalation, satisfaction tracking.
